title: Nursery Rhyme. LXXXI. Proverbs.
content:
To make your candles last for a',
        You wives and maids give ear-o!
        To put 'em out's the only way,
        Says honest John Boldero.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. LXXXI. Proverbs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
